creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

According to torstenb@tmpuhf.saar.de (Torsten Blum): 

Mailbox-locking can be configured at runtime (add +flock_mailbox in 
${PREFIX}/lib/smail/config). UUCP_SYSTEM_FILE should not point to 
/etc/uucp/sys because we use the taylor config files which differs 
from the old (HDB) config files (L.sys contains one line per system, 
/etc/uucp/sys does not).
